Filterable fields. Use format: filters=field,value. Available filters:

parameters.description: Start date (inclusive) in ISO format (e.g., 2025-05-01)

roles.description: for frontend rendering, not for any authentication reasons

password.description: Only used when creating or updating a user, not returned in responses

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity

size.description: The size of the ordered MenuItem

quantity.description: The amount of the MenuItem being ordered

containerOrderMenuItems.description: If the ordered MenuItem is a container, the contained items will be listed here

parentOrder.description: The Order this ordered item is on

order.description: The unique identifier of the order that this schedule is for

rrule.description: The rrule string for the schedule

startDate.description: The start date of the schedule, maps to DTSTART in the rrule string

endDate.description: The end date of the schedule, maps to UNTIL in the rrule string

timezone.description: The timezone of the schedule, maps to TZID in the rrule string, defaults to America/New_York

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity

createdAt.description: The date the order was created in the DB

updatedAt.description: The date the order was last modified.

recipient.description: The name of the owner of the order

fulfillmentDate.description: The date the order is due to be picked up or delivered.

fulfillmentType.description: The method of transferring the order to the recipient/fulfillmentContactName (pickup or delivery)

fulfillmentContactName.description: If the order is for delivery and the recipient property isn't who is recieving the order

deliveryAddress.description: If a delivery order, that address to deliver

note.description: an extra information regarding the order

isFrozen.description: A flag to 'pause' or 'freeze' an order, not included in DB queries for services like aggregates for Reports.

category.description: The assigned category of the order

orderedItems.description: If the ordered MenuItem is a container, the contained items will be populated here

recurrenceSchedule.description: The schedule of the recurring order

recurrenceDate.description: The original of the occurence, used to properly regenerated orders

templateOrderId.description: The unique identifier of the template order that this occurence is based on

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity

containedMenuItemId.description: Id of the MenuItem that is being ordered

containedItemSizeId.description: Id of the MenuItemSize that is being ordered, must be a valid size to the containedMenuItem

quantity.description: amount of the containedMenuItem / containedItemSize being ordered

parentMenuItemIdCtx.description: Id of the MenuItem that is this item's container, ctx denotes it is used to assist in creating the entity, but is not a mapped property

parentMenuItemSizeIdCtx.description: Id of the MenuItemSize of the Menuitem that is this item's container, ctx denotes it is used to assist in creating the entity, but is not a mapped property

menuItemId.description: Id of MenuItem entity being ordered.

sizeId.description: Id of the MenuItemSize entity. Must be valid size for the MenuItem being ordered.

quantity.description: Amount being ordered.

containerOrderMenuItems.description: Dtos when creating an OrderMenuItem entity that is a container for a list of MenuItem

daysOfWeek.description: The days of the week that the schedule is active, values between 0-6

dayOfMonth.description: The day of the month that the schedule is active, values between 1-31

monthOfYear.description: The month of the year that the schedule is active, values between 1-12

startDate.description: The start date of the schedule, maps to DTSTART in the rrule string

endDate.description: The end date of the schedule, maps to UNTIL in the rrule string

timezone.description: The timezone of the schedule, maps to TZID in the rrule string, defaults to America/New_York

recipient.description: Name of the owner of the order

fulfillmentDate.description: Date the order is to be available or delivered.

fulfillmentContactName.description: Name of who is picking up the order or reciving the delivery

isFrozen.description: A frozen order is inactive and is not included for typical buisness logic opeations. Not included in aggregates or reports.

isWeekly.description: Is true if the order occurs on a weekly basis.

weeklyFulfillment.description: If is weekly, is the day of the week the order is fulfilled

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity

ingredientInventoryItem.description: The InventoryItem this ingredient uses, if this property is referenced, ingredientRecipe property must be null.

ingredientRecipe.description: The Recipe this ingredient uses, if this property is referenced, ingredientInventoryItem must be null.

quantity.description: Returns from DB as a string, the numerical value of the quantityMeasure property of the ingredient

unit.description: The unit of measure symbol for the ingredient quantity

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity

producedMenuItem.description: The referenced MenuItem if this recipe produces one.

batchResultQuantity.description: The total unit amout of the batchResultUnitOfMeaure property produced by the recipe.

batchResultUnit.description: The unit symbol that describes the total yield the recipe produces.

servingSizeQuantity.description: A unit amount of the servingSizeUnit property that is a subset of the batchResultQuantity property.

servingSizeUnit.description: The unit symbol that describes the total sellable portions of the recipes yield

isIngredient.description: A flag for if a recipe is used as an ingredient in other recipes

subCategory.description: The sub category of the recipe

ingredients.description: A list of ingredients for the recipe

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity

recipes.description: List of Recipes under the subcategory

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity

subCategories.description: List of subcategories under the category

recipes.description: List of recipes under the category

ingredientInventoryItemId.description: Id of InventoryItem used as the ingredient, is optional. If inventoryItemId is null, subRecipeIngredientId must be populated, both cannot be populated.

ingredientRecipeId.description: Id of Recipe entity being used as a recipe ingredient, is optional. If subRecipeIngredientId is null, inventoryItemId must be populated, both cannot be populated.

quantity.description: The unit amount of the unit of measure of the InventoryItem

unit.description: Unit symbol for the ingredient quantity (e.g. "kg", "cup", "ea").

producedMenuItemId.description: Id of the MenuItem that the recipe produces.

batchResultQuantity.description: The unit amount the recipe produces.

batchResultUnit.description: Unit symbol expressing the unit size of what the recipe produces.

servingSizeQuantity.description: The unit amount of the servingSizeUnit describing the amount that is sold.

servingSizeUnit.description: Unit symbol representing the unit size of what is sold.

salesPrice.description: The price of purchasing the serving size amount.

isIngredient.description: If the recipe is used as an ingredient.(Not sold directly)

subCategoryId.description: Id of the RecipeSubCategory entity. Must be a child subcategory to the referenced RecipeCategory

ingredientInventoryItemId.description: Id of InventoryItem used as the ingredient, is optional. If inventoryItemId is null, subRecipeIngredientId must be populated, both cannot be populated.

ingredientRecipeId.description: Id of Recipe entity being used as a recipe ingredient, is optional. If subRecipeIngredientId is null, inventoryItemId must be populated, both cannot be populated.

quantity.description: The unit amount of the unit of measure of the InventoryItem

unit.description: Unit symbol for the ingredient quantity (e.g. "kg", "cup", "ea").

producedMenuItemId.description: Id of the MenuItem that the recipe produces.

batchResultQuantity.description: The unit amount the recipe produces.

batchResultUnit.description: Unit symbol expressing the unit size of what the recipe produces.

servingSizeQuantity.description: The unit amount of the servingSizeUnit describing the amount that is sold.

servingSizeUnit.description: Unit symbol representing the unit size of what is sold.

salesPrice.description: The price of purchasing the serving size amount.

isIngredient.description: If the recipe is used as an ingredient.(Not sold directly)

subCategoryId.description: Id of the RecipeSubCategory entity. Must be a child subcategory to the referenced RecipeCategory

subCategories.description: Array of CreateChildRecipeSubCategoryDtos, child dtos are used when creating the parent RecipeCategory with child RecipeSubCategory entities.
Array of CreateChildRecipeSubCategoryDtos, child dtos are used when creating the parent RecipeCategory with child RecipeSubCategory entities.

parentCategoryId.description: Id of the RecipeCategory parent entity.

ingredientInventoryItemId.description: Id of InventoryItem used as the ingredient, is optional. If inventoryItemId is null, subRecipeIngredientId must be populated, both cannot be populated.

ingredientRecipeId.description: Id of Recipe entity being used as a recipe ingredient, is optional. If subRecipeIngredientId is null, inventoryItemId must be populated, both cannot be populated.

quantity.description: The unit amount of the unit of measure of the InventoryItem

unit.description: Unit symbol for the ingredient quantity (e.g. "kg", "cup", "ea").

parentRecipeId.description: Id of the Recipe entity that is the parent. Is required if sending DTO to recipe-ingredient endpoint. Is not required if sending DTO as a nested dto of a create recipe request.

ingredientInventoryItemId.description: Id of InventoryItem used as the ingredient, is optional. If inventoryItemId is null, subRecipeIngredientId must be populated, both cannot be populated.

ingredientRecipeId.description: Id of Recipe entity being used as a recipe ingredient, is optional. If subRecipeIngredientId is null, inventoryItemId must be populated, both cannot be populated.

quantity.description: The unit amount of the unit of measure of the InventoryItem

unit.description: Unit symbol for the ingredient quantity (e.g. "kg", "cup", "ea").

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity

templateMenuItems.description: A list of template items representing the rows of the printed template

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity

displayName.description: Name to be printed on document representing the MenuItem

tablePosIndex.description: A 1-based index specifying the row order of this template item on the template (1 being the first row at the top ignoring the header row)

menuItem.description: The item being represented in the template item (as a row on the template)

parentTemplate.description: The template this template item is for

displayName.description: Name to be used on the baking list representing the referenced MenuItem.

tablePosIndex.description: The row position of the TemplateMenuItem on the parent Template.

menuItemId.description: Id of the MenuItem entity being displayed on the Template.
